meaning: adj.[地]冰川边缘的,冰缘的 冰缘区的
examples: There are more than 60 kinds periglacial landforms all over the world.
A number of these changes represented adaptations to grazing in Siberia's periglacial conditions.
Wedge-shaped structure which is isolated from massive diamictite may be filled with the decay of an ice wedge in periglacial environment.
